playbooks.description: Prevents further command execution or lateral movement while investigation continues.

playbooks.action: Force password reset for affected account(s) + revoke active sessions
playbooks.description: Limits damage from stolen or exposed credentials.

playbooks.action: Block destination IP/domain at firewall + isolate host
Isolate host + audit all accounts/hosts touched by the lateral movement tool
playbooks.description: Contains spread and scopes the true blast radius.

playbooks.action: Escalate to Tier 2 analyst for manual log review
playbooks.description: Evasion techniques often indicate a more sophisticated actor; needs human judgment.

playbooks.action: Monitor + log only, no immediate action
playbooks.description: Reconnaissance-stage activity; often benign admin tooling, but worth tracking.

default_action: Escalate to Tier 2 analyst for manual review
note: This is a simplified static playbook library for demo purposes. A production system would tie into a real SOAR platform.
